vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The biome is significantly degraded compared to the registry. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2/P4 (Mexican Mint/Silver Guest) are largely absent or reduced to necrotic debris. P3 (Pothos) is the only identifiable living specimen, though it is struggling.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected in the yellow pot.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf remains, though showing signs of chlorosis and dehydration.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No viable plant matter detected.

plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot_Left: Contains the white rabbit anchor. One primary leaf remains, showing signs of edge necrosis.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot_Right: Contains a single, upright, pale green leaf (likely a Pothos cutting or sprout).

biome_observations.soil_texture: Dry, granular, and lacking moisture. Surface debris (white particulate) suggests mineral buildup or perlite.

temporal_deltas.t-4_to_t-2: Progressive browning of the necrotic leaf in the rabbit pot.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_current: The Pothos leaf in the foreground has maintained its posture but shows no signs of new growth or vigor.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of 'Stasis-Decay'. The lack of moisture and the presence of necrotic tissue suggest the plants are failing to thrive due to improper hydration or substrate exhaustion. The Pothos is the only survivor, but it is in a precarious state.
anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments in the soil of the foreground pot (P3/P4 area).
White rabbit anchor is the only consistent structural element.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical environment is failing. The registry indicates a diverse set of plants, but the visual evidence confirms a near-total loss of the original specimens. The remaining Pothos leaf is pale, suggesting light stress or nutrient deficiency. The soil is dry and appears to have been amended with eggshells, which have not yet integrated into the substrate. The environment is currently hostile to the remaining plant life.
